domain: rail, transit, elevator/escalator maintenance, public-infrastructure service tools, and alignment fixtures

ideas.product_context: Railway track maintenance crews checking elastic rail fastening clips during inspection rounds.
ideas.core_function: Slides over a rail clip and provides a mechanical reference surface for measuring whether clip deflection remains within service limits.
ideas.likely_main_part: Stepped bridge gauge body with rail-foot locating pads, clip clearance slot, and probe reference boss.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires nested cutouts, asymmetric stepped surfaces, datum pads, rail-profile clearances, and functional gauge features that must relate precisely to one another.

ideas.product_context: Metro and light-rail maintenance depots servicing sliding passenger door mechanisms.
ideas.core_function: Temporarily mounts to the door track and positions a roller carriage at the correct height and lateral offset during replacement.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined clamp block with V-track seat, offset roller cradle, locking screw bosses, and calibration faces.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines track-following geometry, offset reference planes, cylindrical roller nests, clamp screw clearances, and inspection datums.

ideas.idea_title: Escalator Step Chain Pitch Wear Gauge
ideas.product_context: Escalator maintenance teams checking step chain elongation without removing the full chain assembly.
ideas.core_function: Indexes across several chain pins and shows whether accumulated pitch wear exceeds the allowed limit.
ideas.likely_main_part: Long gauge bar with precision pin pockets, tapered lead-in slots, relief channels, and engraved limit reference zones.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests repeated feature spacing, elongated slots, tolerance-critical pocket placement, thin ribs, and long-part proportional accuracy.

ideas.idea_title: Elevator Guide Rail Fishplate Drilling Template
ideas.product_context: Elevator installation and modernization crews replacing or adding guide rail splice plates.
ideas.core_function: Locates on the elevator guide rail profile and guides drilling for accurately positioned fishplate bolt holes.
ideas.likely_main_part: Profiled rail saddle template with drill bush pockets, side clamp ears, and relieved central web clearance.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires a recognizable rail-profile negative, multiple coaxial hole features, bushing counterbores, clamp tabs, and nonuniform wall thickness.

ideas.idea_title: Platform Screen Door Threshold Height Gauge
ideas.product_context: Transit station service teams verifying the height relationship between platform coping, train floor, and platform screen door threshold.
ideas.core_function: Spans from platform datum surfaces to the screen door sill and provides fixed reference steps for allowable vertical offsets.
ideas.likely_main_part: Folded-profile gauge block with wide base foot, raised sill contact ledge, stepped limit faces, and handle slot.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises stepped datum geometry, large flat contact faces, ergonomic through-slots, chamfered edges, and clearly separated measurement levels.

ideas.idea_title: Rail Switch Point Gap Setting Wedge
ideas.product_context: Railway turnout maintenance crews setting and confirming the gap between switch point and stock rail.
ideas.core_function: Fits between rail surfaces to hold or verify a precise switch-point opening during adjustment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Tapered wedge gauge with contoured rail-contact faces, stop shoulder, extraction hole, and marked thickness bands.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests tapered solids, curved contact faces, engraved reference bands, through-holes normal to sloped surfaces, and robust end-stop geometry.

ideas.idea_title: Escalator Comb Plate Tooth Inspection Fixture
ideas.product_context: Escalator service technicians checking comb plate tooth spacing, straightness, and broken-tooth replacement fit.
ideas.core_function: Indexes against multiple comb teeth and provides reference slots for evaluating pitch and tooth alignment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Comb-matching gauge plate with repeated narrow slots, front datum lip, offset handle boss, and clearance scallops.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires dense repeated thin features, pitch consistency, shallow datum lips, local reliefs, and a mix of plate and raised boss geometry.

ideas.product_context: Overhead electrification crews aligning support brackets for tram, metro, or rail catenary hardware.
ideas.core_function: Temporarily bolts to a mast bracket and presents angled reference faces for setting the cantilever arm orientation.
ideas.likely_main_part: Angular fixture block with bolt slots, inclined reference plane, gusset-like ribs, and locating dowel holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines angled planes, slotted fastener holes, ribbed reinforcement, datum hole patterns, and multi-axis feature relationships.

ideas.idea_title: Manhole Cover Lifter Hook Wear Gauge
ideas.product_context: Municipal infrastructure maintenance crews inspecting lifting hooks used for heavy road and utility covers.
ideas.core_function: Checks hook throat opening, tip wear, and shank deformation against fixed go/no-go profiles.
ideas.likely_main_part: Thick go/no-go gauge plate with hook-profile cutouts, stepped throat references, grip slot, and hanging hole.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests complex internal profiles, multiple functional cutouts, thick plate modeling, rounded stress-relief corners, and labeled reference geometry.

ideas.product_context: Elevator machine-room maintenance crews replacing or adjusting brake pads on traction machines.
ideas.core_function: Centers the brake pad relative to the drum or disc face while maintaining a defined service clearance.
ideas.likely_main_part: C-shaped centering fixture with curved drum reference face, pad pocket, spacer lands, and thumb-screw bosses.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires curved reference geometry, open C-frame topology, pocketed locating surfaces, opposing clearance lands, and threaded-boss placement.
